player_notes.joel embiid: Out — underwent emergency appendicitis surgery Thursday. Will miss PHI's game vs. IND today; expect expanded roles for Philly's remaining big men.
player_notes.jayson tatum: Played 40 minutes last night (24 pts, 13 reb, 8 ast) and exited healthy. No restriction concerns for BOS vs. NOP today.
player_notes.lebron james: Played full game last night (26 pts, 11 ast, 8 reb). Monitor rest/availability for LAL vs. PHX today given back-to-back.
player_notes.alex sarr: Out for WAS's final three games with a toe injury. Reduces WIZ rotation depth vs. MIA today.

game_notes.PHI vs IND: Joel Embiid out (appendicitis surgery) — significant usage and minutes redistribution for 76ers' frontcourt/secondary scorers.
game_notes.LAL vs PHX: LeBron James played last night; back-to-back situation — monitor pregame availability/minutes restriction reports.
game_notes.MIA vs WAS: Alex Sarr ruled out for WAS, thinning Wizards' frontcourt rotation. Also note Terry Rozier being waived — already on leave all season, no game-day impact.

This is a new, additional absence on top of whatever prior injury kept him out — the context doc listed him as already out, but this appendicitis surgery is a confirmed new development that cements his absence through season's end and potentially into the playoffs.
suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Add Joel Embiid appendicitis surgery (April 10, 2026) to the season-ending absences or player notes section. Clarify that his absence is now confirmed through the end of the regular season and his playoff availability is in serious doubt. Update PHI suppressor note to reflect Embiid is definitively out for the foreseeable future.
